description: A plain candid operational/arrest photograph with no on-image text or graphic design. On a sunny day in a paved parking area lined with large trees draped in Spanish moss, two officers in plain-clothes tactical attire (one in a dark polo and tan pants, the other in a dark shirt with a tactical vest reading 'ERO' and tan pants) escort a handcuffed man (wearing a purple/blue checked shirt and dark jeans, hands cuffed behind his back) across the asphalt. A white passenger van and a red vehicle are parked under the trees in the background. The scene depicts an ICE Enforcement and Removal Operations (ERO) arrest connected to Operation Tidal Wave per the tweet. No slogans, seals, or meme design elements are present, so it is documentary rather than a designed graphic.
